tool_args.label: East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: East Side Access: On October 31, 2021 a test train ran into the new Grand Central Terminal for Long Island Rail Road carrying Governor Kathy Hochul and many senior MTA staff members. This marked a milestone in the much-anticipated East Side Access project, which is on track to be completed in December 2022.

payload.description: Major project to bring LIRR service to Grand Central Terminal. On October 31, 2021 a test train ran into the new Grand Central Terminal for LIRR. On track to be completed in December 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: East Side Access: On October 31, 2021 a test train ran into the new Grand Central Terminal for Long Island Rail Road carrying Governor Kathy Hochul and many senior MTA staff members. tool_args.label: LIRR Sandy Restoration and Resiliency Project Phase 3B
tool_args.raw_text: Construct Phase 3B of Long Island Rail Road's Sandy Restoration and Resiliency Project for the Long Island City Storage Yard

payload.project_name: LIRR Sandy Restoration and Resiliency Project Phase 3B
payload.description: Construction of Phase 3B of the Long Island Rail Road's Sandy Restoration and Resiliency Project for the Long Island City Storage Yard. Includes a new floodwall, pumping system, yard lighting, restoration of Tracks 11 and 12, and eight options including rail electrification, graffiti-resistant coating, and decorative panels.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development ('C&D') requests the Board approve the award of a publicly advertised, competitively solicited and negotiated Public Works contract to Posillico Civil, Inc. ... to construct Phase 3B of Long Island Rail Road's ('LIRR') Sandy Restoration and Resiliency Project for the Long Island City ('LIC') Storage Yard
The Contract provides for construction of Phase 3B including a new floodwall, pumping system, yard lighting and restoration of Tracks 11 and 12.
